title: Copilot troubleshooters
license_note: Screenshots from support.microsoft.com. Confirm redistribution with your legal team before use in a shipped product.

steps.text: Copilot license troubleshooter Start the Get Help app. In the Search bar, enter Copilot License Troubleshooter. Follow the steps provided.
Copilot connectivity troubleshooter Start the Get Help app. In the Search bar, enter Copilot connectivity troubleshooter. Follow the steps provided.
